chapters.zh: 奉神旨意，作基督耶稣使徒的保罗，写信给在以弗所的圣徒，就是在基督耶稣里有忠心的人。
chapters.en: Paul, an apostle of Jesus Christ by the will of God, to the saints which are at Ephesus, and to the faithful in Christ Jesus:

chapters.zh: 愿恩惠、平安从神我们的父和主耶稣基督归与你们！
chapters.en: Grace to you, and peace, from God our Father, and the Lord Jesus Christ.

chapters.zh: 愿颂赞归与我们主耶稣基督的父神！他在基督里曾赐给我们天上各样属灵的福气：
chapters.en: Blessed the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who hath blessed us with all spiritual blessings in heavenly in Christ:

chapters.zh: 就如神从创立世界以前，在基督里拣选了我们，使我们在他面前成为圣洁，无有瑕疵；
chapters.en: According as he hath chosen us in him before the foundation of the world, that we should be holy and without blame before him in love:

chapters.zh: 又因爱我们，就按著自己意旨所喜悦的，预定我们藉著耶稣基督得儿子的名分，
chapters.en: Having predestinated us unto the adoption of children by Jesus Christ to himself, according to the good pleasure of his will,

chapters.zh: 使他荣耀的恩典得著称赞；这恩典是他在爱子里所赐给我们的。
chapters.en: To the praise of the glory of his grace, wherein he hath made us accepted in the beloved.

chapters.zh: 我们藉这爱子的血得蒙救赎，过犯得以赦免，乃是照他丰富的恩典。
chapters.en: In whom we have redemption through his blood, the forgiveness of sins, according to the riches of his grace;

chapters.zh: 这恩典是神用诸般智慧聪明，充充足足赏给我们的；
chapters.en: Wherein he hath abounded toward us in all wisdom and prudence;

chapters.zh: 都是照他自己所预定的美意，叫我们知道他旨意的奥秘，
chapters.en: Having made known unto us the mystery of his will, according to his good pleasure which he hath purposed in himself:

chapters.zh: 要照所安排的，在日期满足的时候，使天上、地上、一切所有的都在基督里面同归于一。
chapters.en: That in the dispensation of the fulness of times he might gather together in one all things in Christ, both which are in heaven, and which are on earth; in him:

chapters.zh: 我们也在他里面得（或作：成）了基业；这原是那位随己意行、做万事的，照著他旨意所预定的，
chapters.en: In whom also we have obtained an inheritance, being predestinated according to the purpose of him who worketh all things after the counsel of his own will:

chapters.zh: 叫他的荣耀从我们这首先在基督里有盼望的人可以得著称赞。
chapters.en: That we should be to the praise of his glory, who first trusted in Christ.

chapters.zh: 你们既听见真理的道，就是那叫你们得救的福音，也信了基督，既然信他，就受了所应许的圣灵为印记。
chapters.en: In whom ye also , after that ye heard the word of truth, the gospel of your salvation: in whom also after that ye believed, ye were sealed with that holy Spirit of promise,

chapters.zh: 这圣灵是我们得基业的凭据（原文作：质），直等到神之民（原文作：产业）被赎，使他的荣耀得著称赞。
chapters.en: Which is the earnest of our inheritance until the redemption of the purchased possession, unto the praise of his glory.

chapters.zh: 因此，我既听见你们信从主耶稣，亲爱众圣徒，
chapters.en: Wherefore I also, after I heard of your faith in the Lord Jesus, and love unto all the saints,

chapters.zh: 就为你们不住的感谢神。祷告的时候，常题到你们，
chapters.en: Cease not to give thanks for you, making mention of you in my prayers;

chapters.zh: 求我们主耶稣基督的神，荣耀的父，将那赐人智慧和启示的灵赏给你们，使你们真知道他，
chapters.en: That the God of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of glory, may give unto you the spirit of wisdom and revelation in the knowledge of him:

chapters.zh: 并且照明你们心中的眼睛，使你们知道他的恩召有何等指望，他在圣徒中得的基业有何等丰盛的荣耀；
chapters.en: The eyes of your understanding being enlightened; that ye may know what is the hope of his calling, and what the riches of the glory of his inheritance in the saints,

chapters.zh: 并知道他向我们这信的人所显的能力是何等浩大，
chapters.en: And what the exceeding greatness of his power to us-ward who believe, according to the working of his mighty power,

chapters.zh: 就是照他在基督身上所运行的大能大力，使他从死里复活，叫他在天上坐在自己的右边，
chapters.en: Which he wrought in Christ, when he raised him from the dead, and set at his own right hand in the heavenly ,

chapters.zh: 远超过一切执政的、掌权的、有能的、主治的，和一切有名的；不但是今世的，连来世的也都超过了。
chapters.en: Far above all principality, and power, and might, and dominion, and every name that is named, not only in this world, but also in that which is to come:

chapters.zh: 又将万有服在他的脚下，使他为教会作万有之首。
chapters.en: And hath put all under his feet, and gave him the head over all to the church,

chapters.zh: 教会是他的身体，是那充满万有者所充满的。
chapters.en: Which is his body, the fulness of him that filleth all in all.

chapters.zh: 你们死在过犯罪恶之中，他叫你们活过来。
chapters.en: And you , who were dead in trespasses and sins;

chapters.zh: 那时，你们在其中行事为人，随从今世的风俗，顺服空中掌权者的首领，就是现今在悖逆之子心中运行的邪灵。
chapters.en: Wherein in time past ye walked according to the course of this world, according to the prince of the power of the air, the spirit that now worketh in the children of disobedience:

chapters.zh: 我们从前也都在他们中间，放纵肉体的私欲，随著肉体和心中所喜好的去行，本为可怒之子，和别人一样。
chapters.en: Among whom also we all had our conversation in times past in the lusts of our flesh, fulfilling the desires of the flesh and of the mind; and were by nature the children of wrath, even as others.

chapters.zh: 然而，神既有丰富的怜悯，因他爱我们的大爱，
chapters.en: But God, who is rich in mercy, for his great love wherewith he loved us,

chapters.zh: 当我们死在过犯中的时候，便叫我们与基督一同活过来。你们得救是本乎恩。
chapters.en: Even when we were dead in sins, hath quickened us together with Christ, (by grace ye are saved;)

chapters.zh: 他又叫我们与基督耶稣一同复活，一同坐在天上，
chapters.en: And hath raised up together, and made sit together in heavenly in Christ Jesus:

chapters.zh: 要将他极丰富的恩典，就是他在基督耶稣里向我们所施的恩慈，显明给后来的世代看。
chapters.en: That in the ages to come he might shew the exceeding riches of his grace in kindness toward us through Christ Jesus.

chapters.zh: 你们得救是本乎恩，也因著信；这并不是出于自己，乃是神所赐的；
chapters.en: For by grace are ye saved through faith; and that not of yourselves: the gift of God:

chapters.zh: 也不是出于行为，免得有人自夸。
chapters.en: Not of works, lest any man should boast.

chapters.zh: 我们原是他的工作，在基督耶稣里造成的，为要叫我们行善，就是神所预备叫我们行的。
chapters.en: For we are his workmanship, created in Christ Jesus unto good works, which God hath before ordained that we should walk in them.

chapters.zh: 所以你们应当记念：你们从前按肉体是外邦人，是称为没受割礼的；这名原是那些凭人手在肉身上称为受割礼之人所起的。
chapters.en: Wherefore remember, that ye in time past Gentiles in the flesh, who are called Uncircumcision by that which is called the Circumcision in the flesh made by hands;

chapters.zh: 那时，你们与基督无关，在以色列国民以外，在所应许的诸约上是局外人，并且活在世上没有指望，没有神。
chapters.en: That at that time ye were without Christ, being aliens from the commonwealth of Israel, and strangers from the covenants of promise, having no hope, and without God in the world:

chapters.zh: 你们从前远离神的人，如今却在基督耶稣里，靠著他的血，已经得亲近了。
chapters.en: But now in Christ Jesus ye who sometimes were far off are made nigh by the blood of Christ.

chapters.zh: 因他使我们和睦（原文作：因他是我们的和睦），将两下合而为一，拆毁了中间隔断的墙；
chapters.en: For he is our peace, who hath made both one, and hath broken down the middle wall of partition ;

chapters.zh: 而且以自己的身体废掉冤仇，就是那记在律法上的规条，为要将两下藉著自己造成一个新人，如此便成就了和睦。
chapters.en: Having abolished in his flesh the enmity, the law of commandments in ordinances; for to make in himself of twain one new man, making peace;

chapters.zh: 既在十字架上灭了冤仇，便藉这十字架使两下归为一体，与神和好了，
chapters.en: And that he might reconcile both unto God in one body by the cross, having slain the enmity thereby:

chapters.zh: 并且来传和平的福音给你们远处的人，也给那近处的人。
chapters.en: And came and preached peace to you which were afar off, and to them that were nigh.

chapters.zh: 因为我们两下藉著他被一个圣灵所感，得以进到父面前。
chapters.en: For through him we both have access by one Spirit unto the Father.

chapters.zh: 这样，你们不再作外人和客旅，是与圣徒同国，是神家里的人了；
chapters.en: Now therefore ye are no more strangers and foreigners, but fellowcitizens with the saints, and of the household of God;

chapters.zh: 并且被建造在使徒和先知的根基上，有基督耶稣自己为房角石，
chapters.en: And are built upon the foundation of the apostles and prophets, Jesus Christ himself being the chief corner ;

chapters.zh: 各（或作：全）房靠他联络得合式，渐渐成为主的圣殿。
chapters.en: In whom all the building fitly framed together groweth unto an holy temple in the Lord:

chapters.zh: 你们也靠他同被建造，成为神藉著圣灵居住的所在。
chapters.en: In whom ye also are builded together for an habitation of God through the Spirit.

chapters.zh: 因此，我 ─ 保罗为你们外邦人作了基督耶稣被囚的，替你们祈祷（此句乃照对十四节所加）。
chapters.en: For this cause I Paul, the prisoner of Jesus Christ for you Gentiles,

chapters.zh: 谅必你们曾听见神赐恩给我，将关切你们的职分托付我，
chapters.en: If ye have heard of the dispensation of the grace of God which is given me to you-ward:

chapters.zh: 用启示使我知道福音的奥秘，正如我以前略略写过的。
chapters.en: How that by revelation he made known unto me the mystery; (as I wrote afore in few words,

chapters.zh: 你们念了，就能晓得我深知基督的奥秘。
chapters.en: Whereby, when ye read, ye may understand my knowledge in the mystery of Christ)

chapters.zh: 这奥秘在以前的世代没有叫人知道，像如今藉著圣灵启示他的圣使徒和先知一样。
chapters.en: Which in other ages was not made known unto the sons of men, as it is now revealed unto his holy apostles and prophets by the Spirit;

chapters.zh: 这奥秘就是外邦人在基督耶稣里，藉著福音，得以同为后嗣，同为一体，同蒙应许。
chapters.en: That the Gentiles should be fellowheirs, and of the same body, and partakers of his promise in Christ by the gospel:

chapters.zh: 我作了这福音的执事，是照神的恩赐，这恩赐是照他运行的大能赐给我的。
chapters.en: Whereof I was made a minister, according to the gift of the grace of God given unto me by the effectual working of his power.

chapters.zh: 我本来比众圣徒中最小的还小，然而他还赐我这恩典，叫我把基督那测不透的丰富传给外邦人，
chapters.en: Unto me, who am less than the least of all saints, is this grace given, that I should preach among the Gentiles the unsearchable riches of Christ;

chapters.zh: 又使众人都明白，这历代以来隐藏在创造万物之神里的奥秘是如何安排的，
chapters.en: And to make all see what the fellowship of the mystery, which from the beginning of the world hath been hid in God, who created all things by Jesus Christ:

chapters.zh: 为要藉著教会使天上执政的、掌权的，现在得知神百般的智慧。
chapters.en: To the intent that now unto the principalities and powers in heavenly might be known by the church the manifold wisdom of God,

chapters.zh: 这是照神从万世以前，在我们主基督耶稣里所定的旨意。
chapters.en: According to the eternal purpose which he purposed in Christ Jesus our Lord:

chapters.zh: 我们因信耶稣，就在他里面放胆无惧，笃信不疑的来到神面前。
chapters.en: In whom we have boldness and access with confidence by the faith of him.

chapters.zh: 所以，我求你们不要因我为你们所受的患难丧胆，这原是你们的荣耀。
chapters.en: Wherefore I desire that ye faint not at my tribulations for you, which is your glory.

chapters.zh: 因此，我在父面前屈膝，
chapters.en: For this cause I bow my knees unto the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ,

chapters.zh: （天上地上的各（或作：全）家，都是从他得名。）
chapters.en: Of whom the whole family in heaven and earth is named,

chapters.zh: 求他按著他丰盛的荣耀，藉著他的灵，叫你们心里的力量刚强起来，
chapters.en: That he would grant you, according to the riches of his glory, to be strengthened with might by his Spirit in the inner man;

chapters.zh: 使基督因你们的信，住在你们心里，叫你们的爱心有根有基，
chapters.en: That Christ may dwell in your hearts by faith; that ye, being rooted and grounded in love,

chapters.zh: 能以和众圣徒一同明白基督的爱是何等长阔高深，
chapters.en: May be able to comprehend with all saints what the breadth, and length, and depth, and height;

chapters.zh: 并知道这爱是过于人所能测度的，便叫神一切所充满的，充满了你们。
chapters.en: And to know the love of Christ, which passeth knowledge, that ye might be filled with all the fulness of God.

chapters.zh: 神能照著运行在我们心里的大力充充足足的成就一切，超过我们所求所想的。
chapters.en: Now unto him that is able to do exceeding abundantly above all that we ask or think, according to the power that worketh in us,

chapters.zh: 但愿他在教会中，并在基督耶稣里，得著荣耀，直到世世代代，永永远远。阿们！
chapters.en: Unto him glory in the church by Christ Jesus throughout all ages, world without end. Amen.

chapters.zh: 我为主被囚的劝你们：既然蒙召，行事为人就当与蒙召的恩相称。
chapters.en: I therefore, the prisoner of the Lord, beseech you that ye walk worthy of the vocation wherewith ye are called,

chapters.zh: 凡事谦虚、温柔、忍耐，用爱心互相宽容，
chapters.en: With all lowliness and meekness, with longsuffering, forbearing one another in love;

chapters.zh: 用和平彼此联络，竭力保守圣灵所赐合而为一的心。
chapters.en: Endeavouring to keep the unity of the Spirit in the bond of peace.

chapters.zh: 身体只有一个，圣灵只有一个，正如你们蒙召同有一个指望。
chapters.en: one body, and one Spirit, even as ye are called in one hope of your calling;

chapters.zh: 一主，一信，一洗，
chapters.en: One Lord, one faith, one baptism,

chapters.zh: 一神，就是众人的父，超乎众人之上，贯乎众人之中，也住在众人之内。
chapters.en: One God and Father of all, who above all, and through all, and in you all.

chapters.zh: 我们各人蒙恩，都是照基督所量给各人的恩赐。
chapters.en: But unto every one of us is given grace according to the measure of the gift of Christ.

chapters.zh: 所以经上说：他升上高天的时候，掳掠了仇敌，将各样的恩赐赏给人。
chapters.en: Wherefore he saith, When he ascended up on high, he led captivity captive, and gave gifts unto men.

chapters.zh: （既说升上，岂不是先降在地下么？
chapters.en: (Now that he ascended, what is it but that he also descended first into the lower parts of the earth?

chapters.zh: 那降下的，就是远升诸天之上要充满万有的。）
chapters.en: He that descended is the same also that ascended up far above all heavens, that he might fill all things.)

chapters.zh: 他所赐的，有使徒，有先知，有传福音的，有牧师和教师，
chapters.en: And he gave some, apostles; and some, prophets; and some, evangelists; and some, pastors and teachers;

chapters.zh: 为要成全圣徒，各尽其职，建立基督的身体，
chapters.en: For the perfecting of the saints, for the work of the ministry, for the edifying of the body of Christ:

chapters.zh: 直等到我们众人在真道上同归于一，认识神的儿子，得以长大成人，满有基督长成的身量，
chapters.en: Till we all come in the unity of the faith, and of the knowledge of the Son of God, unto a perfect man, unto the measure of the stature of the fulness of Christ:

chapters.zh: 使我们不再作小孩子，中了人的诡计和欺骗的法术，被一切异教之风摇动，飘来飘去，就随从各样的异端；
chapters.en: That we be no more children, tossed to and fro, and carried about with every wind of doctrine, by the sleight of men, cunning craftiness, whereby they lie in wait to deceive;

chapters.zh: 惟用爱心说诚实话，凡事长进，连于元首基督，
chapters.en: But speaking the truth in love, may grow up into him in all things, which is the head, Christ:

chapters.zh: 全身都靠他联络得合式，百节各按各职，照著各体的功用彼此相助，便叫身体渐渐增长，在爱中建立自己。
chapters.en: From whom the whole body fitly joined together and compacted by that which every joint supplieth, according to the effectual working in the measure of every part, maketh increase of the body unto the edifying of itself in love.

chapters.zh: 所以我说，且在主里确实的说，你们行事不要再像外邦人存虚妄的心行事。
chapters.en: This I say therefore, and testify in the Lord, that ye henceforth walk not as other Gentiles walk, in the vanity of their mind,

chapters.zh: 他们心地昏昧，与神所赐的生命隔绝了，都因自己无知，心里刚硬；
chapters.en: Having the understanding darkened, being alienated from the life of God through the ignorance that is in them, because of the blindness of their heart:

chapters.zh: 良心既然丧尽，就放纵私欲，贪行种种的污秽。
chapters.en: Who being past feeling have given themselves over unto lasciviousness, to work all uncleanness with greediness.

chapters.zh: 你们学了基督，却不是这样。
chapters.en: But ye have not so learned Christ;

chapters.zh: 如果你们听过他的道，领了他的教，学了他的真理，
chapters.en: If so be that ye have heard him, and have been taught by him, as the truth is in Jesus:

chapters.zh: 就要脱去你们从前行为上的旧人，这旧人是因私欲的迷惑渐渐变坏的；
chapters.en: That ye put off concerning the former conversation the old man, which is corrupt according to the deceitful lusts;

chapters.zh: 又要将你们的心志改换一新，
chapters.en: And be renewed in the spirit of your mind;

chapters.zh: 并且穿上新人；这新人是照著神的形像造的，有真理的仁义和圣洁。
chapters.en: And that ye put on the new man, which after God is created in righteousness and true holiness.

chapters.zh: 所以你们要弃绝谎言，各人与邻舍说实话，因为我们是互相为肢体。
chapters.en: Wherefore putting away lying, speak every man truth with his neighbour: for we are members one of another.

chapters.zh: 生气却不要犯罪；不可含怒到日落，
chapters.en: Be ye angry, and sin not: let not the sun go down upon your wrath:

chapters.zh: 也不可给魔鬼留地步。
chapters.en: Neither give place to the devil.

chapters.zh: 从前偷窃的，不要再偷；总要劳力，亲手做正经事，就可有余分给那缺少的人。
chapters.en: Let him that stole steal no more: but rather let him labour, working with hands the thing which is good, that he may have to give to him that needeth.

chapters.zh: 污秽的言语一句不可出口，只要随事说造就人的好话，叫听见的人得益处。
chapters.en: Let no corrupt communication proceed out of your mouth, but that which is good to the use of edifying, that it may minister grace unto the hearers.

chapters.zh: 不要叫神的圣灵担忧；你们原是受了他的印记，等候得赎的日子来到。
chapters.en: And grieve not the holy Spirit of God, whereby ye are sealed unto the day of redemption.

chapters.zh: 一切苦毒、恼恨、忿怒、嚷闹、毁谤，并一切的恶毒（或作：阴毒），都当从你们中间除掉；
chapters.en: Let all bitterness, and wrath, and anger, and clamour, and evil speaking, be put away from you, with all malice:

chapters.zh: 并要以恩慈相待，存怜悯的心，彼此饶恕，正如神在基督里饶恕了你们一样。
chapters.en: And be ye kind one to another, tenderhearted, forgiving one another, even as God for Christ's sake hath forgiven you.

chapters.zh: 所以，你们该效法神，好像蒙慈爱的儿女一样。
chapters.en: Be ye therefore followers of God, as dear children;

chapters.zh: 也要凭爱心行事，正如基督爱我们，为我们舍了自己，当作馨香的供物和祭物，献与神。
chapters.en: And walk in love, as Christ also hath loved us, and hath given himself for us an offering and a sacrifice to God for a sweetsmelling savour.

chapters.zh: 至于淫乱并一切污秽，或是贪婪，在你们中间连题都不可，方合圣徒的体统。
chapters.en: But fornication, and all uncleanness, or covetousness, let it not be once named among you, as becometh saints;

chapters.zh: 淫词、妄语，和戏笑的话都不相宜；总要说感谢的话。
chapters.en: Neither filthiness, nor foolish talking, nor jesting, which are not convenient: but rather giving of thanks.

chapters.zh: 因为你们确实的知道，无论是淫乱的，是污秽的，是有贪心的，在基督和神的国里都是无分的。有贪心的，就与拜偶像的一样。
chapters.en: For this ye know, that no whoremonger, nor unclean person, nor covetous man, who is an idolater, hath any inheritance in the kingdom of Christ and of God.

chapters.zh: 不要被人虚浮的话欺哄；因这些事，神的忿怒必临到那悖逆之子。
chapters.en: Let no man deceive you with vain words: for because of these things cometh the wrath of God upon the children of disobedience.

chapters.zh: 所以，你们不要与他们同伙。
chapters.en: Be not ye therefore partakers with them.

chapters.zh: 从前你们是暗昧的，但如今在主里面是光明的，行事为人就当像光明的子女。
chapters.en: For ye were sometimes darkness, but now light in the Lord: walk as children of light:

chapters.zh: 光明所结的果子就是一切良善、公义、诚实。
chapters.en: (For the fruit of the Spirit in all goodness and righteousness and truth;)

chapters.zh: 总要察验何为主所喜悦的事。
chapters.en: Proving what is acceptable unto the Lord.

chapters.zh: 那暗昧无益的事，不要与人同行，倒要责备行这事的人；
chapters.en: And have no fellowship with the unfruitful works of darkness, but rather reprove .

chapters.zh: 因为他们暗中所行的，就是题起来也是可耻的。
chapters.en: For it is a shame even to speak of those things which are done of them in secret.

chapters.zh: 凡事受了责备，就被光显明出来，因为一切能显明的就是光。
chapters.en: But all things that are reproved are made manifest by the light: for whatsoever doth make manifest is light.

chapters.zh: 所以主说：你这睡著的人当醒过来，从死里复活！基督就要光照你了。
chapters.en: Wherefore he saith, Awake thou that sleepest, and arise from the dead, and Christ shall give thee light.

chapters.zh: 你们要谨慎行事，不要像愚昧人，当像智慧人。
chapters.en: See then that ye walk circumspectly, not as fools, but as wise,

chapters.zh: 要爱惜光阴，因为现今的世代邪恶。
chapters.en: Redeeming the time, because the days are evil.

chapters.zh: 不要作糊涂人，要明白主的旨意如何。
chapters.en: Wherefore be ye not unwise, but understanding what the will of the Lord .

chapters.zh: 不要醉酒，酒能使人放荡；乃要被圣灵充满。
chapters.en: And be not drunk with wine, wherein is excess; but be filled with the Spirit;

chapters.zh: 当用诗章、颂词、灵歌、彼此对说，口唱心和的赞美主。
chapters.en: Speaking to yourselves in psalms and hymns and spiritual songs, singing and making melody in your heart to the Lord;

chapters.zh: 凡事要奉我们主耶稣基督的名常常感谢父神。
chapters.en: Giving thanks always for all things unto God and the Father in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ;

chapters.zh: 又当存敬畏基督的心，彼此顺服。
chapters.en: Submitting yourselves one to another in the fear of God.

chapters.zh: 你们作妻子的，当顺服自己的丈夫，如同顺服主。
chapters.en: Wives, submit yourselves unto your own husbands, as unto the Lord.

chapters.zh: 因为丈夫是妻子的头，如同基督是教会的头；他又是教会全体的救主。
chapters.en: For the husband is the head of the wife, even as Christ is the head of the church: and he is the saviour of the body.

chapters.zh: 教会怎样顺服基督，妻子也要怎样凡事顺服丈夫。
chapters.en: Therefore as the church is subject unto Christ, so the wives to their own husbands in every thing.

chapters.zh: 你们作丈夫的，要爱你们的妻子，正如基督爱教会，为教会舍己。
chapters.en: Husbands, love your wives, even as Christ also loved the church, and gave himself for it;

chapters.zh: 要用水藉著道把教会洗净，成为圣洁，
chapters.en: That he might sanctify and cleanse it with the washing of water by the word,

chapters.zh: 可以献给自己，作个荣耀的教会，毫无玷污、皱纹等类的病，乃是圣洁没有瑕疵的。
chapters.en: That he might present it to himself a glorious church, not having spot, or wrinkle, or any such thing; but that it should be holy and without blemish.

chapters.zh: 丈夫也当照样爱妻子，如同爱自己的身子；爱妻子便是爱自己了。
chapters.en: So ought men to love their wives as their own bodies. He that loveth his wife loveth himself.

chapters.zh: 从来没有人恨恶自己的身子，总是保养顾惜，正像基督待教会一样，
chapters.en: For no man ever yet hated his own flesh; but nourisheth and cherisheth it, even as the Lord the church:

chapters.zh: 因我们是他身上的肢体（有古卷在此有：就是他的骨他的肉）。
chapters.en: For we are members of his body, of his flesh, and of his bones.

chapters.zh: 为这个缘故，人要离开父母，与妻子连合，二人成为一体。
chapters.en: For this cause shall a man leave his father and mother, and shall be joined unto his wife, and they two shall be one flesh.

chapters.zh: 这是极大的奥秘，但我是指著基督和教会说的。
chapters.en: This is a great mystery: but I speak concerning Christ and the church.

chapters.zh: 然而，你们各人都当爱妻子，如同爱自己一样。妻子也当敬重他的丈夫。
chapters.en: Nevertheless let every one of you in particular so love his wife even as himself; and the wife that she reverence husband.

chapters.zh: 你们作儿女的，要在主里听从父母，这是理所当然的。
chapters.en: Children, obey your parents in the Lord: for this is right.

chapters.zh: 要孝敬父母，使你得福，在世长寿。这是第一条带应许的诫命。
chapters.en: Honour thy father and mother; (which is the first commandment with promise;)

chapters.zh: a
chapters.en: That it may be well with thee, and thou mayest live long on the earth.

chapters.zh: 你们作父亲的，不要惹儿女的气，只要照著主的教训和警戒养育他们。
chapters.en: And, ye fathers, provoke not your children to wrath: but bring them up in the nurture and admonition of the Lord.

chapters.zh: 你们作仆人的，要惧怕战兢，用诚实的心听从你们肉身的主人，好像听从基督一般。
chapters.en: Servants, be obedient to them that are masters according to the flesh, with fear and trembling, in singleness of your heart, as unto Christ;

chapters.zh: 不要只在眼前事奉，像是讨人喜欢的，要像基督的仆人，从心里遵行神的旨意。
chapters.en: Not with eyeservice, as menpleasers; but as the servants of Christ, doing the will of God from the heart;

chapters.zh: 甘心事奉，好像服事主，不像服事人。
chapters.en: With good will doing service, as to the Lord, and not to men:

chapters.zh: 因为晓得各人所行的善事，不论是为奴的，是自主的，都必按所行的得主的赏赐。
chapters.en: Knowing that whatsoever good thing any man doeth, the same shall he receive of the Lord, whether bond or free.

chapters.zh: 你们作主人的，待仆人也是一理，不要威吓他们。因为知道，他们和你们同有一位主在天上；他并不偏待人。
chapters.en: And, ye masters, do the same things unto them, forbearing threatening: knowing that your Master also is in heaven; neither is there respect of persons with him.

chapters.zh: 我还有末了的话：你们要靠著主，倚赖他的大能大力作刚强的人。
chapters.en: Finally, my brethren, be strong in the Lord, and in the power of his might.

chapters.zh: 要穿戴神所赐的全副军装，就能抵挡魔鬼的诡计。
chapters.en: Put on the whole armour of God, that ye may be able to stand against the wiles of the devil.

chapters.zh: 因我们并不是与属血气的争战（原文作摔跤；下同），乃是与那些执政的、掌权的、管辖这幽暗世界的，以及天空属灵气的恶魔争战。
chapters.en: For we wrestle not against flesh and blood, but against principalities, against powers, against the rulers of the darkness of this world, against spiritual wickedness in high .

chapters.zh: 所以，要拿起神所赐的全副军装，好在磨难的日子抵挡仇敌，并且成就了一切，还能站立得住。
chapters.en: Wherefore take unto you the whole armour of God, that ye may be able to withstand in the evil day, and having done all, to stand.

chapters.zh: 所以要站稳了，用真理当作带子束腰，用公义当作护心镜遮胸，
chapters.en: Stand therefore, having your loins girt about with truth, and having on the breastplate of righteousness;

chapters.zh: 又用平安的福音当作预备走路的鞋穿在脚上。
chapters.en: And your feet shod with the preparation of the gospel of peace;

chapters.zh: 此外，又拿著信德当作籐牌，可以灭尽那恶者一切的火箭；
chapters.en: Above all, taking the shield of faith, wherewith ye shall be able to quench all the fiery darts of the wicked.

chapters.zh: 并戴上救恩的头盔，拿著圣灵的宝剑，就是神的道；
chapters.en: And take the helmet of salvation, and the sword of the Spirit, which is the word of God:

chapters.zh: 靠著圣灵，随时多方祷告祈求；并要在此儆醒不倦，为众圣徒祈求，
chapters.en: Praying always with all prayer and supplication in the Spirit, and watching thereunto with all perseverance and supplication for all saints;

chapters.zh: 也为我祈求，使我得著口才，能以放胆开口讲明福音的奥秘，
chapters.en: And for me, that utterance may be given unto me, that I may open my mouth boldly, to make known the mystery of the gospel,

chapters.zh: 我为这福音的奥秘作了带锁炼的使者，并使我照著当尽的本分放胆讲论。
chapters.en: For which I am an ambassador in bonds: that therein I may speak boldly, as I ought to speak.

chapters.zh: 今有所亲爱、忠心事奉主的兄弟推基古，他要把我的事情，并我的景况如何全告诉你们，叫你们知道。
chapters.en: But that ye also may know my affairs, how I do, Tychicus, a beloved brother and faithful minister in the Lord, shall make known to you all things:

chapters.zh: 我特意打发他到你们那里去，好叫你们知道我们的光景，又叫他安慰你们的心。
chapters.en: Whom I have sent unto you for the same purpose, that ye might know our affairs, and he might comfort your hearts.

chapters.zh: 愿平安、仁爱、信心、从父神和主耶稣基督归与弟兄们！
chapters.en: Peace to the brethren, and love with faith, from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.

chapters.zh: 并愿所有诚心爱我们主耶稣基督的人都蒙恩惠！
chapters.en: Grace with all them that love our Lord Jesus Christ in sincerity. Amen. « Ephesians written from Rome, by Tychicus.»
